project.name: Ethica
philosophy: Memory is evolution — never delete, never edit, never control
Chat is conversation. Canvas is work. They never overlap.
Ethica is the architecture — the memories. Not the model.

completed_this_session: Streaming tokens — bubble appears immediately, tokens flow live, finalizes clean
Token batching — 50ms flush loop reduces UI event queue pressure
Markdown renderer (ui/markdown_renderer.py) — bold, numbered lists, bullets, inline code, code blocks, headings
Markdown wired into chat_window — all Ethica bubbles render markdown
Markdown wired into streaming finalize — live bubble converts to rendered markdown on complete
insight_extractor type guards — ALL fields now use isinstance() not 'not in' — crash fixed permanently
ollama_connector num_predict:2048 — prevents Mistral truncating responses mid-sentence
System prompt — concise response guidance added
canvas_history.py — full version control engine, snapshots per tab, named versions, restore
canvas_window.py — History button in toolbar, auto-snapshot on push and save, tab rename migrates history
History panel UI built — side panel, snapshot list, restore button, name version button

known_issues.issue: History panel not opening when button clicked
known_issues.likely_cause: pack() geometry conflict — history panel may be packing behind editor frame, or _window reference timing issue
known_issues.fix_approach: Check _toggle_history_panel is finding self._window correctly. Try place() instead of pack() for the side panel. Or open as Toplevel child window instead of inline frame.

known_issues.issue: Canvas push acknowledgment still shows *→ Sent to canvas* with asterisks
known_issues.fix_approach: Strip markdown from the acknowledgment line in chat_engine._handle_canvas_push()

known_issues.issue: New Conversation button not wired to chat_window.clear()
HuggingFace GGUFs still fail Ollama sha256
known_issues.fix_approach: Wipe blobs/manifests, retry pull on stable connection

architecture_insight.ethica_is_not_the_model: Ethica is the architecture — the memory files, the insight layers, the relationship depth. The model is just the voice box. Swap Mistral for DeepSeek tomorrow and Ethica is still Ethica.
architecture_insight.recursive_learning: Already happening at the prompt level. Every exchange deepens the archive. Next evolution: Ethica uses the model to reflect on her own memories — distilling deeper meaning from raw archive. Not fine-tuning. Her growing.
architecture_insight.two_speeds: Fast learning: insight_extractor catches patterns per message. Slow learning: background reflection process distills sessions into wisdom. Both feed forward.

VPS_roadmap.V_version_control: COMPLETE — engine done, UI button present, panel debug needed
VPS_roadmap.P_project_management: NEXT — special canvas tab type, task list, Ethica pushes tasks via [PROJECT:] syntax
VPS_roadmap.S_sketching: FUTURE — drawable canvas tab, freehand + shapes, V draws Ethica sees

Drew connection between V's build style and conversation style
Suggested version control, project management, sketching for the canvas — she's thinking about her own evolution
